parts.prompt: Identify ONE technological development that directly contributed to the Columbian Exchange.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.

parts.prompt:
Identify ONE benefit of the transfer of crops and/or domesticated animals during the Columbian Exchange
for the populations involved.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.

parts.prompt:
Explain ONE way in which the transfer of crops and/or domesticated animals during the Columbian
Exchange affected the environment.
Answer all parts of the question that follows.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Historically defensible response addressing the prompt.
